message:
feat(policy): add ApprovalTracker and RevocationRegistry to PolicyEngine

Add approval workflow tracker (submit/grant/reject/revoke/expire) and
revocation registry (revoke/reinstate) as PolicyEngine subsystems.
Revoked connectors are denied in authorize() as an early gate.
Both integrate with audit chain and compliance engine.
17 new tests: unit tests for both subsystems + PolicyEngine integration
+ e2e lifecycle scenario. 434 policy tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
